description: Add homepage URL to the Figma plugin. Figma's wildcard pattern covers subdomains but www.figma.com/files is the universal entry point.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/figma && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to Figma plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://www.figma.com/files/recents-and-sharing' to both the Figma plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: FigmaPlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://www.figma.com/files/recents-and-sharing' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/figma/src/index.ts (add homepage property to FigmaPlugin class)
- plugins/figma/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The FigmaPlugin class currently has:
```typescript
class FigmaPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'figma';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Figma';
  override readonly displayName = 'Figma';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.figma.com/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.figma.com/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://www.figma.com/files/recents-and-sharing';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://www.figma.com/files/recents-and-sharing"
```

Constraints:
- Use `https://www.figma.com/files/recents-and-sharing` (the recents page), NOT just `https://figma.com` (which redirects but is not the app).
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns.
